  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)
}{alimd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alimdh}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Inferenzform von Satz 19.21]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi
}{alrimi}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimih}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Form von Satz 19.21 mit zusätzlicher Nichtfreiheitsannahme]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi) \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)
}{alrimdd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5rd}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alimd}{3,4}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syld}{2,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Form von Satz 19.21 mit zwei Nichtfreiheitsannahmen]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)
}{alrimd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1i}{2}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimdd}{1,3,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Form von Satz 19.22]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \exists x \chi)
}{eximd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \exists x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximdh}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Inferenz zu Satz 19.23]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi
}{exlimi}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.23}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpgbi}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Existenzelimination]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \chi)
}{exlimd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \exists x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximd}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{2}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\exists x \chi \leftrightarrow \chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{4}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbitrdi}{3,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Existenzelimination im Stil der natürlichen Deduktion]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi) \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow \chi
}{exlimimdd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{4}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2,4}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimd}{2,3,4}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3,4}{(\varphi \rightarrow \chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpd}{1,5}}
\end{tabproof}
\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{exlimimdd} ist genau die übliche Existenzelimination: aus einer Existenzannahme und einem davon unabhängigen Ableitungsschritt auf \(\chi\) folgt \(\chi\).
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Existenzelimination mit konjunktiver Hilfsannahme]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi) \dsep ((\varphi \land \psi) \rightarrow \chi)
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow \chi
}{exlimdd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{4}{((\varphi \land \psi) \rightarrow \chi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{4}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ex}{4}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3,4}{(\varphi \rightarrow \chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimimdd}{1,2,3,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Negierte Existenz im Kontext]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \neg \psi)
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow \neg \exists x \psi
}{nexd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \neg \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \neg \exists x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nexdh}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungsregel für den Allquantor im Kontext]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall x \chi)
}{albid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albidh}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungsregel für den Existenzquantor im Kontext]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \exists x \chi)
}{exbid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \exists x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbidh}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenzsatz für effektive Nichtfreiheit]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \leftrightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi)
}{nfbidf}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \exists x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbid}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albid}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{%
    \varphi \rightarrow \bigl((\exists x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)\bigr)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi12d}{3,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \leftrightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi \leftrightarrow (\exists x \chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \leftrightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4g}{6,5,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\section{Quantoren über Äquivalenz, Konjunktion und Disjunktion}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.16]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \psi)
}{19.16}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albi}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr3id}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.17]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \psi)
}{19.17}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albi}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitrdi}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.27]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \land \psi)
}{19.27}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \land \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.26}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\forall x \varphi \land \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi2i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.28]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \land \forall x \psi)
}{19.28}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \land \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.26}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\forall x \varphi \land \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \land \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bianbi}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \land \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.19]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x \psi)
}{19.19}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbi}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr3id}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.36]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)
}{19.36}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.35}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Inferenz zu Satz 19.36]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep \exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi
}{19.36i}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.36}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpbi}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.37]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi)
}{19.37}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.35}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi1i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.32]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \lor \forall x \psi)
}{19.32}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \neg \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfn}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\neg \varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\neg \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.21}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{((\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\neg \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-or}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(\neg \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{((\varphi \lor \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\neg \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-or}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \lor \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{5,3,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.31]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \lor \psi)
}{19.31}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\psi \lor \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \lor \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.32}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{((\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \lor \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orcom}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(\psi \lor \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{((\psi \lor \forall x \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orcom}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \varphi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{4,2,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.41]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \land \psi)
}{19.41}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \rightarrow (\exists x \varphi \land \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.40}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\exists x \varphi \land \exists x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi2i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \rightarrow (\exists x \varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylib}{1,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\psi \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow (\varphi \land \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm3.21}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\psi \rightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \exists x(\varphi \land \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximd}{2,6}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\exists x \varphi \land \psi) \rightarrow \exists x(\varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impcom}{7}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{5,8}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.42]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \land \exists x \psi)
}{19.42}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\psi \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \psi \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.41}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow \exists x(\psi \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exancom}}
  \proofstep{}{((\varphi \land \exists x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \psi \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ancom}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \land \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{3,2,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.44]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \lor \psi)
}{19.44}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \lor \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.43}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\exists x \varphi \lor \exists x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orbi2i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.45]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \lor \exists x \psi)
}{19.45}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \lor \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.43}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{((\exists x \varphi \lor \exists x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \lor \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orbi1i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x(\varphi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \lor \exists x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\section{Implizite Substitution und Variablenwechsel}

\FormulaThm[Spezialisierung mittels impliziter Substitution]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi
}{spimfv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x\, x = y)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax6ev}}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\exists x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximii}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.36i}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Implizite Substitution in ein Theorem]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi) \dsep \varphi
  \vdash
  \psi
}{chvarfv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{biimpd}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{spimfv}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{3}{\varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{\psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpg}{4,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Variablenwechsel unter Allquantoren]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall y \psi
}{cbv3v2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{spimfv}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimiv}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz zweier Darstellungen der Substitution]{%
  \exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi)
}{sbalex}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \exists x(x = t \land \varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfe1}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \rightarrow (x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{ax12ev2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow \exists x(x = t \land \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{equs4v}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{3,4}}
\end{tabproof}
\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{sbalex} zeigt, dass sich Substitution sowohl existential über \(x=t\land\varphi\) als auch universal über \(x=t\rightarrow\varphi\) ausdrücken lässt.
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Ältere Form von \FormulaRefAuto{sbalex}]{%
  \exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi)
}{sbalexOLD}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (x = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi)))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{ax12v2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    ((x = t \land \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{imp}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimi}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow \exists x(x = t \land \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{equs4v}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = t \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{4,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Version von \FormulaRefAuto{sb4a} mit Disjunktheitsbedingung]{%
  [t / x]\forall t \varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi)
}{sb4av}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall t \varphi \rightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\forall t \varphi \rightarrow [t / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbimi}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb6}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\forall t \varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = t \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylib}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Substitution auf beide Seiten einer Implikation]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\chi)
}{sbimd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,\FormulaRefAuto{id}}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{2,\FormulaRefAuto{spsbim}{2}}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Substitution auf beide Seiten einer Äquivalenz]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi)
}{sbbid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{2,\FormulaRefAuto{spsbbi}{2}}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Doppelte deduktive Substitution auf beide Seiten einer Äquivalenz]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi)) \dsep \operatorname{Ⅎ} y \varphi
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow ([t / x][u / y]\psi \leftrightarrow [t / x][u / y]\chi)
}{2sbbid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep t\dsep u}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} y \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow ([u / y]\psi \leftrightarrow [u / y]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbid}{3,2}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow ([t / x][u / y]\psi \leftrightarrow [t / x][u / y]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbid}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Gleichheitssatz für Substitution]{%
  x = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow [t / x]\varphi)
}{sbequ1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow (y = t \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equeucl}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax12v}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow (y = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl6}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow (y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{com23}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimdv}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfsb}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow [t / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbitrrdi}{5,6}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Gleichheitssatz für Substitution]{%
  x = t \rightarrow ([t / x]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi)
}{sbequ2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfsb}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \rightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{biimpi}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow \exists y(x = y \land t = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equvinva}}
  \proofstep{}{(t = y \rightarrow y = t)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equcomi}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow (x = y \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{((y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)) \rightarrow (t = y \rightarrow (x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imim12i}{4,5}}
  \proofstep{}{((y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)) \rightarrow ((x = y \land t = y) \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impcomd}{6}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)) \rightarrow (\exists y(x = y \land t = y) \rightarrow \exists y \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{aleximi}{7}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \rightarrow (x = t \rightarrow \exists y \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl2im}{2,3,8}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y \varphi \rightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax5e}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = t \rightarrow ([t / x]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl6com}{9,10}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Substitutivität der Gleichheit]{%
  x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi)
}{stdpc7}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ2}}
\end{tabproof}
\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{stdpc7} ist die übliche Substitutivität der Gleichheit in substitutionslogischer Form.
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Gleichheitssatz für Substitution]{%
  x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi)
}{sbequ12}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow [y / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ1}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ2}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbid}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Gleichheitssatz für Substitution, umgekehrte Form]{%
  x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)
}{sbequ12r}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bicomd}{1,\FormulaRefAuto{equcoms}}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Elimination der Substitution]{%
  \varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x(x = y \land [x / y]\varphi)
}{sbelx}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12r}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(x = y \land [x / y]\varphi) \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equsexvw}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x(x = y \land [x / y]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bicomi}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Gleichheitssatz für vertauschte Substitutionen]{%
  x = y \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow [x / y]\varphi)
}{sbequ12a}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12r}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow [x / y]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr2d}{2,1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Identitätssatz für Substitution]{%
  [x / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi
}{sbid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = x)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equid}}
  \proofstep{}{(x = x \rightarrow ([x / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12r}}
  \proofstep{}{([x / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-mp}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Kompositionsgesetz für Substitution]{%
  [y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi
}{sbcov}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ12r}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbiiev}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Ältere Form von \FormulaRefAuto{sbcov}]{%
  [y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi
}{sbcovOLD}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x][y / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbcom3vv}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbid}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][y / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbii}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz für Substitution]{%
  [y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow [x / y]\varphi)
}{sb6a}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbcov}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x][x / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow [x / y]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb6}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow [x / y]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr3i}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Rückgängigmachen einer Substitution]{%

}{sbid2vw}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%

}

  \proofstep{}{([t / x][x / t]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbievw}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Verallgemeinerung von \FormulaRefAuto{axc16}]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi)
}{axc16g}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z\dsep w}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow \forall z\, z = w)}{\FormulaRefAuto{aevlem}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = w \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z(z = w \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax12v}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall z\, z = w \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z(z = w \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sps}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = w \rightarrow ((z = w \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm2.27}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall z\, z = w \rightarrow (\forall z(z = w \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{al2imi}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall z\, z = w \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syld}{3,5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{1,6}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Beweis des älteren Axioms \FormulaRefAuto{ax-c16}]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)
}{axc16}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Bikonditionale Verstärkung von \FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall z \varphi)
}{axc16gb}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall z \varphi \rightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbid1}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Unter \FormulaRefAuto{axc16} ist jede Formel effektiv nicht frei]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} z \varphi
}{axc16nf}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\neg \varphi \rightarrow \forall z \neg \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists z \varphi \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\neg \varphi \rightarrow \forall z \neg \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximal}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\exists z \varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylibr}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow ((\exists z \varphi \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall z \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syld}{3,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} z \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfd}{5}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Version von \FormulaRefAuto{axc11} mit Disjunktheitsbedingung]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall y \varphi)
}{axc11v}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall y \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc16g}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall y \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{spsd}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Umgekehrte Version von \FormulaRefAuto{axc11v}]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\forall y \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)
}{axc11rv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%

}
