  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow (\forall y \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{spsd}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungslemma für die Distinktorreduktion]{%
  \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow ([x / z]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / z]\varphi)
}{drsb2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(x = y \rightarrow ([x / z]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / z]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, x = y \rightarrow ([x / z]\varphi \leftrightarrow [y / z]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sps}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz zur impliziten Allsubstitution]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi
}{equsalv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, x = y \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.23}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{((x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow (x = y \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm5.74i}{2}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x\, x = y)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax6ev}}
  \proofstep{}{(\psi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, x = y \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1bi}{6}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{5,2,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz zur impliziten Existsubstitution]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi
}{equsexv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{((x = y \land \varphi) \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{biimpa}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimi}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equsalv}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \rightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equs4v}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\psi \rightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylbir}{5,6}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{4,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution verändert eine nicht freie Variable nicht]{%
  (\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))
}{sbft}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\varphi \rightarrow \exists x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{spsbe}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9t}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbitrid}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5r}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x \varphi \rightarrow [y / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{stdpc4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow [y / x]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl6}{4,5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbid}{3,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution für eine nicht freie Variable verändert die Formel nicht]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash [y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi
}{sbf}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \rightarrow ([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbft}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-mp}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution hat auf eine gebundene Variable keinen Effekt]{%
  [y / x]\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \varphi
}{sbf2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \forall x \varphi
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    ([y / x]\forall x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{sbf}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution verändert eine Formel nicht, wenn bereits \(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x\varphi\) gilt]{%
  (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi) \vdash [y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi
}{sbh}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbf}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Die Variable \(x\) ist in \(\lbrack y/x \rbrack \varphi\) nicht frei]{%
  [y / x]\varphi \rightarrow \forall x [y / x]\varphi
}{hbs1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x[y / x]\varphi
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfs1v}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    ([y / x]\varphi \rightarrow \forall x[y / x]\varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Substitution erhalten]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \vdash \operatorname{Ⅎ} x[y / x]\varphi
}{nfs1f}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbf}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x[y / x]\varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfr}{2,1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Alternative Definition der Substitution bei disjunkten Variablen]{%
  [y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)
}{sb5}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb6}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbalex}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Eigenschaft zur Substitution mit Disjunktheitsbedingung]{%
  \exists x(x = y \land \forall y \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)
}{equs5av}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{ax12v2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (x = y \rightarrow (\forall y \varphi \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{spsd}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    ((x = y \land \forall y \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{imp}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\exists x(x = y \land \forall y \varphi) \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimi}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz für doppelte Substitution]{%
  [z / x][w / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x \exists y((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi)
}{2sb5}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z\dsep w}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{([z / x][w / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x(x = z \land [w / y]\varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y(x = z \land (y = w \land \varphi)) \leftrightarrow (x = z \land \exists y(y = w \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.42v}}
  \proofstep{}{(((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow (x = z \land (y = w \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anass}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \exists y(x = z \land (y = w \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{([w / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists y(y = w \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb5}}
  \proofstep{}{((x = z \land [w / y]\varphi) \leftrightarrow (x = z \land \exists y(y = w \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi2i}{5}}
  \proofstep{}{((x = z \land [w / y]\varphi) \leftrightarrow \exists y((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4ri}{6,2,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(x = z \land [w / y]\varphi) \leftrightarrow \exists x \exists y((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{7}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / x][w / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x \exists y((x = z \land y = w) \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,8}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Alternative Definition von \FormulaRefAuto{dfsb} ohne Konflikt zwischen \(t\), \(x\) und \(\varphi\)]{%
  [t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists y(y = t \land \exists x(x = y \land \varphi))
}{dfsb7}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y(y = t \land \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)) \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbalex}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbalex}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = t \rightarrow (\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1bi}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y(y = t \rightarrow \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)) \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfsb}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists y(y = t \land \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4ri}{5,4,1}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Negation innerhalb und außerhalb der Substitution]{%
  [t / x]\neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg [t / x]\varphi
}{sbn}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep t}%
}
\begin{tabproofwide}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \neg \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfsb}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \neg \varphi) \leftrightarrow \neg \exists x(x = y \land \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alinexa}}
  \proofstep{}{((y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \neg \varphi)) \leftrightarrow (y = t \rightarrow \neg \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2i}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y(y = t \rightarrow \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \neg \varphi)) \leftrightarrow \forall y(y = t \rightarrow \neg \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y(y = t \rightarrow \neg \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)) \leftrightarrow \neg \exists y(y = t \land \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alinexa}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\varphi \leftrightarrow \exists y(y = t \land \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfsb7}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y(y = t \rightarrow \neg \exists x(x = y \land \varphi)) \leftrightarrow \neg [t / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{xchbinxr}{5,6}}
  \proofstep{}{([t / x]\neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg [t / x]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitri}{1,4,7}}
\end{tabproofwide}

\FormulaThm[Existenzquantor in und aus der Substitution herausziehen]{%
  [z / y]\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x[z / y]\varphi
}{sbex}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\neg \forall x \neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg [z / y]\forall x \neg \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbn}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg [z / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbn}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\forall x \neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x \neg [z / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbalv}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\neg \forall x \neg \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg \forall x \neg [z / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{xchbinx}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \neg \forall x \neg \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-ex}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow [z / y]\neg \forall x \neg \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbii}{5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x[z / y]\varphi \leftrightarrow \neg \forall x \neg [z / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-ex}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \exists x[z / y]\varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{6,4,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Alternative Definition von \enquote{nicht frei}]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)
}{nf5}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \forall x \varphi
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.23}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}
\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{nf5} charakterisiert Nichtfreiheit rein über eine universal quantifizierte Implikation.
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Weitere alternative Definition von \enquote{nicht frei}]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \varphi)
}{nf6}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \exists x \varphi
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfe1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.21}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \leftrightarrow \forall x(\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit im Kontext folgern]{%
  \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi
}{nf5d}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5-1}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{3,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Aus der deduktiven Form folgt die Inferenzform der Nichtfreiheit]{%
  (\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi) \vdash \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi
}{nf5di}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5rd}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm2.43i}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.9 in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi) \vdash \exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi
}{19.9h}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists x \varphi \leftrightarrow \varphi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.21 in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi) \vdash \forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)
}{19.21h}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.21}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Satz 19.23 in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \vdash \forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)
}{19.23h}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\varphi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.23}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Inferenz zu Satz 19.23 in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi
}{exlimih}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x \varphi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimi}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktive Existenzelimination in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi) \dsep (\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi) \dsep (\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \vdash
  \varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \chi)
}{exlimdh}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\varphi \rightarrow \forall x \varphi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \varphi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \chi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\varphi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exlimd}{2,4,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Allsubstitutionsäquivalenz in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi
}{equsalhw}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x(x = y \rightarrow \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equsalv}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Existsubstitutionsäquivalenz in Hypothesenform]{%
  (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \dsep x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi)
  \vdash
  \exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi
}{equsexhv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\operatorname{Ⅎ} x \psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\varphi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x(x = y \land \varphi) \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equsexv}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Die Variable \(x\) ist in \(\forall x\varphi\) nicht frei]{%
  \forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \forall x \varphi
}{hba1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Wffs}{\varphi}%
  \DeltaRow{Setvars}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{%
    \operatorname{Ⅎ} x \forall x \varphi
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{%
    (\forall x \varphi \rightarrow \forall x \forall x \varphi)
  }{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
\end{tabproof}
\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{hba1} ist die elementare Form der Aussage, dass eine gebundene Variable in ihrer eigenen Bindung nicht frei vorkommt.
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Abgeschlossene Form des Gebundenheitsaufbaus für die Negation]{%
  (\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow (\neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi))
}{hbnt}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5-1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfnd}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow (\neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5rd}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Negation erhalten]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \vdash \neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi
}{hbn}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow (\neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbnt}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpg}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktionsform von \FormulaRefAuto{hbn}]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)) \vdash \phi \rightarrow (\neg \psi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \psi)
}{hbnd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimih}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \rightarrow (\neg \psi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbnt}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\neg \psi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{3,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Abgeschlossene Form von \FormulaRefAuto{hbim}]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)) \vdash ((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))
}{hbim1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{a2i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.21h}{1}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylibr}{2,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktionsform von \FormulaRefAuto{hbim}]{%
  \begin{aligned}[t]
    &(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)) \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)) \vdash{}\\
    &\quad \phi \rightarrow ((\psi \rightarrow \chi) \rightarrow \forall x(\psi \rightarrow \chi))
  \end{aligned}
}{hbimd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5dh}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\phi \rightarrow (\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,3}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5dh}{1,4}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,(\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfimd}{3,5}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\phi \rightarrow ((\psi \rightarrow \chi) \rightarrow \forall x(\psi \rightarrow \chi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5rd}{6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Implikation erhalten]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \vdash ((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))
}{hbim}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1i}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbim1}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Konjunktion erhalten]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \vdash ((\phi \land \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \land \psi))
}{hban}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,(\phi \land \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfan}{2,4}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{((\phi \land \psi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter dreifacher Konjunktion erhalten]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \dsep (\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi) \dsep (\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi) \vdash ((\phi \land \psi \land \chi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \land \psi \land \chi))
}{hb3an}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\chi \rightarrow \forall x \chi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{5}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,(\phi \land \psi \land \chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf3an}{2,4,6}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{((\phi \land \psi \land \chi) \rightarrow \forall x(\phi \land \psi \land \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Einführung der Implikation in eine Substitution]{%
  (([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi))
}{sbi2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\neg \psi \leftrightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbn}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm2.21}}
  \proofstep{}{((\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\neg \psi)) \rightarrow (\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbimi}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylbir}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\psi \rightarrow (\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-1}}
  \proofstep{}{(([y / x]\psi \rightarrow (\neg [y / x]\psi \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi)))) \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbimi}{5}}
  \proofstep{}{(([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ja}{4,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Implikation innerhalb und außerhalb einer Substitution sind äquivalent]{%
  ([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))
}{sbim}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbi1}}
  \proofstep{}{(([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \rightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbi2}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution trifft bei nichtfreiem Antezedens nur das Konsequens]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \vdash ([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))
}{sbrim}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbrimvw}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Substitution trifft bei nichtfreiem Konsequens nur das Antezedens]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi \vdash ([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \psi))
}{sblim}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbim}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbf}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Disjunktion innerhalb und außerhalb einer Substitution sind äquivalent]{%
  ([y / x](\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \lor [y / x]\psi))
}{sbor}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbim}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]\neg \psi \leftrightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbn}}
  \proofstep{}{(([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\neg \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2i}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{}{((\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-or}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow [y / x](\phi \rightarrow \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbii}{5}}
  \proofstep{}{(([y / x]\phi \lor [y / x]\psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \neg [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-or}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \lor [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{6,4,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenz innerhalb und außerhalb einer Substitution sind äquivalent]{%
  ([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\psi))
}{sbbi}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{((\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \land (\psi \rightarrow \phi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfbi2}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow [y / x]((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \land (\psi \rightarrow \phi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbii}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbim}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\psi \rightarrow \phi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbim}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x]((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \land (\psi \rightarrow \phi)) \leftrightarrow (([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \land ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\phi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi12i}{3,4}}
  \proofstep{}{((([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\psi) \leftrightarrow (([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \land ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\phi))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfbi2}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (([y / x]\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi) \land ([y / x]\psi \rightarrow [y / x]\phi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{2,5}}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{7,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Einführung einer linken Äquivalenz innerhalb einer Substitution]{%
  ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \vdash ([y / x](\chi \leftrightarrow \phi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow \psi))
}{sblbis}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\chi \leftrightarrow \phi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbi}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\phi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bibi2i}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x](\chi \leftrightarrow \phi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Einführung einer rechten Äquivalenz innerhalb einer Substitution]{%
  ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \vdash ([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))
}{sbrbis}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbi}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bibi1i}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Einführung einer rechten Äquivalenz bei nichtfreier rechter Seite]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi \dsep ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \vdash ([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
}{sbrbif}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{2}{([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbrbis}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{((\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbf}{1}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{([y / x](\phi \leftrightarrow \chi) \leftrightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{2,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit lässt sich durch eine Substitution ziehen]{%
  ([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,[z / y]\phi)
}{sbnf}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow [z / y](\exists x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbii}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y](\exists x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \leftrightarrow ([z / y]\exists x \phi \rightarrow [z / y]\forall x \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbim}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\exists x \phi \leftrightarrow \exists x\,[z / y]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbex}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\forall x \phi \leftrightarrow \forall x\,[z / y]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbal}}
  \proofstep{}{(([z / y]\exists x \phi \rightarrow [z / y]\forall x \phi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x\,[z / y]\phi \rightarrow \forall x\,[z / y]\phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi12i}{4,5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,[z / y]\phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\,[z / y]\phi \rightarrow \forall x\,[z / y]\phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\,[z / y]\phi \rightarrow \forall x\,[z / y]\phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{2,3,6}}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,[z / y]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitri}{8,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Veraltete Fassung von \FormulaRefAuto{sbnf}]{%
  ([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,[z / y]\phi)
}{sbnfOLD}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{([z / y]\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \leftrightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,[z / y]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbnf}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Übergang von impliziter zu expliziter Substitution]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi \dsep (x = y \rightarrow (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)) \vdash ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)
}{sbiev}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbievw}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Veraltete Fassung von \FormulaRefAuto{sbiev}]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi \dsep (x = y \rightarrow (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)) \vdash ([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)
}{sbievOLD}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(x = y \rightarrow (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{([y / x]\phi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbiev}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktionsform des Übergangs von impliziter zu expliziter Substitution]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi) \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (x = y \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))) \vdash (\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))
}{sbiedw}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi\dsep\chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow [y / x]\psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbrim}{1}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\chi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,(\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfim1}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\phi \rightarrow (x = y \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi)))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{3}{(\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbbiiev}{3}}
  \proofstep{3}{(\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\chi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm5.74d}{3}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbiev}{4,7}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{([y / x](\phi \rightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr3i}{2,8}}
  \proofstep{1,2,3}{(\phi \rightarrow ([y / x]\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm5.74ri}{9}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Herleitung von \FormulaRefAuto{ax-c7}]{%
  (\neg \forall x \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \phi)
}{axc7}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbn1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \forall x \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nsyl4}{2,1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Existenzielle Kurzform von \FormulaRefAuto{axc7}]{%
  (\exists x \forall x \phi \rightarrow \phi)
}{axc7e}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \forall x \phi \rightarrow \neg \neg \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbe1a}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \forall x \phi \rightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.21bi}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Prädikatenlogisches Gegenstück zum Brouwer-Axiom \(B\)]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \forall x \neg \phi)
}{modal-b}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \forall x \neg \forall x \neg \phi \rightarrow \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{axc7}}
  \proofstep{}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \forall x \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{con4i}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Abgeschlossene Form von \FormulaRefAuto{19.9h}]{%
  (\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow (\exists x \phi \rightarrow \phi))
}{19.9ht}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5-1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \rightarrow (\exists x \phi \rightarrow \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9d}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \rightarrow (\exists x \phi \rightarrow \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Herleitung von \FormulaRefAuto{ax-c4}]{%
  (\forall x(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))
}{axc4}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \psi \rightarrow \neg \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{con2i}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \neg \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbn1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \forall x \neg \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{con1i}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \psi \rightarrow \forall x(\neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alimi}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \neg \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3syl}{5,3,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \neg \forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alim}{6}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl5}{7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Inferenzform von \FormulaRefAuto{axc4}]{%
  (\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi) \vdash (\forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)
}{axc4i}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x \phi \rightarrow \forall x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Allquantifikation erhalten]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \vdash \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \phi
}{nfal}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall y \phi \rightarrow \forall x \forall y \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbal}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Existenzquantifikation erhalten]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \vdash \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \phi
}{nfex}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y \phi \leftrightarrow \neg \forall y \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-ex}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\neg \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfn}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \neg \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfal}{3}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\neg \forall y \neg \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfn}{4}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfr}{1,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Gebundenheitsaufbau für die Existenz]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi) \vdash (\exists y \phi \rightarrow \forall x \exists y \phi)
}{hbex}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfex}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists y \phi \rightarrow \forall x \exists y \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter dem Nichtfreiheitsprädikat erhalten]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi \vdash \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi
}{nfnf}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi \leftrightarrow (\exists y \phi \rightarrow \forall y \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-nf}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfex}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfal}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,(\exists y \phi \rightarrow \forall y \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfim}{3,4}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfr}{1,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Vertauschung von \(\exists\forall\) in einem Implikationszusammenhang]{%
  (\exists x \forall y(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall y \exists x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))
}{19.12}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall y \forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfa1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\exists x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfex}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sp}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \forall y(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall y \exists x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximi}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \forall y(\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \forall y \exists x(\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\begin{remark}
\FormulaRefAuto{19.12} verschiebt einen Existenz- und einen Allquantor in nur einer Richtung durch einen Implikationszusammenhang. Genau diese Asymmetrie ist später für viele Umformungen mit impliziter Substitution nützlich.
\end{remark}

\FormulaThm[Deduktionsform von \FormulaRefAuto{nfal}]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi) \vdash (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \psi)
}{nfald}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \forall y \psi \rightarrow \forall y \exists x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.12}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\exists x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfrd}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\forall y \exists x \psi \rightarrow \forall y \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alimd}{1,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall y \forall x \psi \rightarrow \forall x \forall y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-11}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\exists x \forall y \psi \rightarrow \forall x \forall y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl56}{1,5,6}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfd}{7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Deduktionsform von \FormulaRefAuto{nfex}]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi) \vdash (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \psi)
}{nfexd}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y \psi \leftrightarrow \neg \forall y \neg \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-ex}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\neg \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfnd}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\forall y \neg \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfald}{1,4}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\neg \forall y \neg \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfnd}{5}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\exists y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfrd}{1,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheit bleibt unter Substitution erhalten]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,\phi \vdash \mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,[y / x]\phi
}{nfsbv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall z \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5ri}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / x]\phi \rightarrow \forall z [y / x]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{hbsbw}{2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,[y / x]\phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nf5i}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Kompositionsgesetz für Substitution]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,\phi \vdash ([y / z][z / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\phi)
}{sbco2v}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{([y / z][z / x]\phi \leftrightarrow [y / x]\phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbco2vv}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Verteilung zweier Allquantoren über eine Konjunktion]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi \dsep \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi \vdash (\forall x \forall y(\phi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \phi \land \forall y \psi))
}{aaan}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x \forall y(\phi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x(\forall y \phi) \land \forall x \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.26-2}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall y \phi \leftrightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\forall x(\forall y \phi) \leftrightarrow \forall x \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall y \forall x \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alcom}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.3}{2}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\forall y \forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{7}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\forall x \psi \leftrightarrow \forall y \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{5,8}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{((\forall x(\forall y \phi) \land \forall x \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \phi \land \forall y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi12i}{4,9}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\forall x \forall y(\phi \land \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x \phi \land \forall y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,10}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Verteilung zweier Existenzquantoren über eine Disjunktion]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi \dsep \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\,\psi \vdash (\exists x \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \phi \lor \exists y \psi))
}{eeor}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep\psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow \neg \forall x \neg \exists y(\phi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.43}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \forall x \neg \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow \exists x \neg \neg \exists y(\phi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow \neg \forall y \neg(\phi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.43}}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\,\phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\neg(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\neg \phi \land \neg \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.9}{1}}

  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x \neg \neg \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \phi \lor \exists y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{7,10}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\neg \forall x \neg \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \phi \lor \exists y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orbi12i}{2,11}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\exists x \exists y(\phi \lor \psi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x \phi \lor \exists y \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,12}}
