  (\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))
}{mojust}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow (x = y \leftrightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equequ2}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow ((\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2d}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albidv}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{cbvexvw}{3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaDef[Definition des Quantors \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  (\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)) \vdash
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))
}{df-mo}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep z}%
}

\FormulaThm[Vereinfachte Form von \FormulaRefAuto{df-mo}]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))
}{dfmo}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{mojust}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-mo}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtexistenz impliziert Eindeutigkeit]{%
  (\neg \exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)
}{nexmo}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \phi \rightarrow (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm2.21}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, \neg \phi \rightarrow \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alimi}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, \neg \phi \rightarrow \forall y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimiv}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, \neg \phi \rightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{19.2d}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, \neg \phi \leftrightarrow \neg \exists x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{alnex}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \exists x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \forall x\, \neg \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{bicomi}{5}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3imtr4i}{4,6,7}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Existenz oder Eindeutigkeit]{%
  (\exists x\, \phi \lor \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)
}{exmo}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nexmo}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists x\, \phi \lor \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{orri}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Absorption der Existenzbedingung durch Eindeutigkeit]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))
}{moabs}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nexmo}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{id}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ja}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbii}{1,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Der Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\) kehrt Implikationen um]{%
  (\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))
}{moim}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{((\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow ((\psi \rightarrow x = y) \rightarrow (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imim1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow x = y) \rightarrow \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{al2imi}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists y\, \forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow x = y) \rightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximdv}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3imtr4g}{3,4,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Der Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\) kehrt Implikationen um]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \vdash
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)
}{moimi}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moim}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpg}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Der Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\) kehrt Implikationen um, deduktive Form]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi)) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))
}{moimdv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimiv}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \chi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moim}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Äquivalenzsatz für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  (\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))
}{mobi}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \land \forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \phi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albiim}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \phi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moim}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moim}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \phi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{impbid21d}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{}{((\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \land \forall x\, (\psi \rightarrow \phi)) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imp}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sylbi}{1,5}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungsregel für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\), Inferenzform]{%
  (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi) \vdash
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi)
}{mobii}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{mobi}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\psi \leftrightarrow \chi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpg}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungsregel für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\), deduktive Form]{%
  (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi)) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))
}{mobidv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x\, (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimiv}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{mobi}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Formelbildungsregel für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\), deduktive Form]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi)) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))
}{mobid}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi\dsep \chi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \forall x\, (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimi}{1,2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\psi \leftrightarrow \chi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{mobi}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \chi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{syl}{3,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Aus Eindeutigkeit einer Implikation folgt Eindeutigkeit des Konsequens]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi)
}{moa1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\psi \rightarrow (\phi \rightarrow \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \rightarrow \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{moimi}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Konjunktion bewahrt Eindeutigkeit]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\psi \land \phi))
}{moan}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{((\psi \land \phi) \rightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{simpr}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\psi \land \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moimi}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Konjunktion bewahrt Eindeutigkeit, Inferenzform]{%
  \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \vdash
  \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\psi \land \phi)
}{moani}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\psi \land \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moan}}
  \proofstep{1}{\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\psi \land \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax-mp}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Entfernen einer Disjunktion bewahrt Eindeutigkeit]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)
}{moor}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\phi \rightarrow (\phi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{orc}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{moimi}{1}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Eindeutigkeit überträgt Disjunktion auf Konjunktion]{%
  ((\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \lor \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \land \psi))
}{mooran1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{((\phi \land \psi) \rightarrow \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{simpl}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moimi}{1}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moan}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \lor \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \land \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{jaoi}{2,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Eindeutigkeit einer Disjunktion impliziert Eindeutigkeit der Konjunkte]{%
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \land \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))
}{mooran2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{moor}}
  \proofstep{}{(\psi \rightarrow (\phi \lor \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{olc}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{moimi}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, (\phi \lor \psi) \rightarrow (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \land \exists^{\le 1} x\, \psi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{jca}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi
}{nfmo1}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfexa2}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfr}{1,2}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \dsep ((\phi \land \neg \forall x\, x = y) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)
}{nfmod2}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{3}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{4}{((\phi \land \neg \forall x\, x = y) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\neg \forall x\, x = y \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, y = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfeqf1}}
  \proofstep{}{((\phi \land \neg \forall x\, x = y) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, y = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{adantl}{5}}
  \proofstep{4}{((\phi \land \neg \forall x\, x = y) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfimd}{4,6}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfald2}{3,7}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists z\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfexd}{2,8}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfrd}{1,9}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)
}{nfmodv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{3}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, y = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfvd}}
  \proofstep{4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfimd}{4,5}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfald}{3,6}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists z\, \forall y\, (\psi \rightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfexd}{2,7}}
  \proofstep{3,4}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfxfrd}{1,8}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi \vdash
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi
}{nfmov}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, T.}{\FormulaRefAuto{nftru}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(T. \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1i}{2}}
  \proofstep{2}{(T. \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfmodv}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{mptru}{4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \dsep (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi) \vdash
  (\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)
}{nfmod}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi\dsep \psi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi)}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{((\phi \land \neg \forall x\, x = y) \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{adantr}{2}}
  \proofstep{1,2}{(\phi \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \psi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfmod2}{1,3}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Nichtfreiheitslemma für den Quantor \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi \vdash
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi
}{nfmo}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, T.}{\FormulaRefAuto{nftru}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{2}{(T. \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{a1i}{2}}
  \proofstep{2}{(T. \rightarrow \mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfmod}{1,3}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} y\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{mptru}{4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[\FormulaRefAuto{df-mo} mit Nichtfreiheitsvoraussetzung]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \vdash
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))
}{mof}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, x = z}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfim}{2,3}}
  \proofstep{2}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfal}{4}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = y \rightarrow (x = z \leftrightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equequ2}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = y \rightarrow ((\phi \rightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2d}{7}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = y \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albidv}{8}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{cbvexv1}{5,6,9}}
  \proofstep{2}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{1,10}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Alternative Definition von \(\exists^{\le 1}\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \vdash
  (\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \forall x\, \forall y\, ((\phi \land [y / x] \phi) \rightarrow x = y))
}{mo3}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;x\, \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfmo1}}

  \proofstep{3,4}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \forall x\, \forall y\, ((\phi \land \psi) \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{2,8}}

\FormulaDef[Formationsregel für den Quantor \(\exists!\)]{%
  \text{Ist }\phi\text{ eine Formel, so ist auch }\exists! x\, \phi\text{ eine Formel.}%
}{weu}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}

\begin{remark}\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo} ist für spätere Verwendungen die praktischere Fassung von \FormulaRefAuto{df-mo}: die in der ursprünglichen Definition vorausgesetzte Unabhängigkeit von der Hilfsvariablen ist nach \FormulaRefAuto{mojust} bereits beweisbar.\end{remark}

\begin{remark}Die Sätze \FormulaRefAuto{mo3}, \FormulaRefAuto{mo4} und \FormulaRefAuto{mo4f} liefern drei klassische Lesarten von \(\exists^{\le 1}\): über explizite Eindeutigkeitszeugen, über doppelte Allquantifikation und über implizite Substitution.\end{remark}

\subsection{Eindeutige Existenz}

\FormulaDef[Definition des Quantors \(\exists!\)]{%
  (\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \land \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))
}{df-eu}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x}%
}

\FormulaThm[Alternative Charakterisierung eindeutiger Existenz]{%
  (\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \land \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))
}{eu3v}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \land \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{df-eu}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmo}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists x\, \phi \land \exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \land \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi2i}{2}}

\end{tabproof}

  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{biancomi}{6}}

  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow ((\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2d}{8}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albidv}{9}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow ((\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y)) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{anbi2d}{10}}
  \proofstep{}{(y = z \rightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z))))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitrid}{7,11}}
  \proofstep{}{((\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \land y = z) \leftrightarrow ((\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)) \land y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{pm5.32ri}{12}}
  \proofstep{}{((\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \land y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitr4i}{5,13}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists z\, (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, (\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \land y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{14}}
  \proofstep{}{\exists z\, y = z}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax6evr}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \land \exists z\, y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{biantru}{16}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4ri}{1,15,17}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \exists z\, (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{18}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y\, \exists z\, (\forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)) \leftrightarrow (\exists y\, \forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exdistrv}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y) \leftrightarrow (\exists y\, \forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow \phi) \land \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bitri}{19,20}}
\end{tabproof}

\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists! x\, \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{moeu}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eu6}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists! x\, \phi) \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{imbi2i}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{((\exists x\, \phi \rightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = y)) \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{dfmoeu}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists^{\le 1} x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists y\, \forall x\, (\phi \rightarrow x = y))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitri}{1,3,4}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Es gibt genau eine zu einer gegebenen Menge gleiche Menge]{%
  \exists! x\, x = y
}{euequ}{%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{\exists x\, x = y}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax6ev}}
  \proofstep{}{\exists z\, z = y}{\FormulaRefAuto{ax6ev}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = y \rightarrow (x = y \rightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equeuclr}}
  \proofstep{}{(z = y \rightarrow \forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{alrimiv}{3}}
  \proofstep{}{\exists z\, \forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow x = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{eximii}{2,4}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists! x\, x = y \leftrightarrow (\exists x\, x = y \land \exists z\, \forall x\, (x = y \rightarrow x = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eu3v}}
  \proofstep{}{\exists! x\, x = y}{\FormulaRefAuto{mpbir2an}{1,5,6}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Hilfssatz zur Variablensubstitution in \(\exists!\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, [w / x] \phi \vdash
  (\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists! y\, [y / x] \phi)
}{sb8eulem}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y\dsep w}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \forall w\, [w / x] (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb8v}}
  \proofstep{}{([w / x] x = z \leftrightarrow w = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{equsb3}}
  \proofstep{}{([w / x] (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow ([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow w = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sblbis}{2}}
  \proofstep{}{(\forall w\, [w / x] (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \forall w\, ([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow w = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{albii}{3}}
  \proofstep{5}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, [w / x] \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, w = z}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{5}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, ([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow w = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfbi}{5,6}}
  \proofstep{}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;w\, ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z)}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfv}}
  \proofstep{}{(w = y \rightarrow ([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow [y / x] \phi))}{\FormulaRefAuto{sbequ}}
  \proofstep{}{(w = y \rightarrow (w = z \leftrightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{equequ1}}
  \proofstep{}{(w = y \rightarrow (([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow w = z) \leftrightarrow ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z)))}{\FormulaRefAuto{bibi12d}{9,10}}
  \proofstep{5}{(\forall w\, ([w / x] \phi \leftrightarrow w = z) \leftrightarrow \forall y\, ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{cbvalv1}{7,8,11}}
  \proofstep{5}{(\forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \forall y\, ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitri}{1,4,12}}
  \proofstep{5}{(\exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z) \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall y\, ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{exbii}{13}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall x\, (\phi \leftrightarrow x = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eu6}}
  \proofstep{}{(\exists! y\, [y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow \exists z\, \forall y\, ([y / x] \phi \leftrightarrow y = z))}{\FormulaRefAuto{eu6}}
  \proofstep{5}{(\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists! y\, [y / x] \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{3bitr4i}{14,15,16}}
\end{tabproof}

\FormulaThm[Variablensubstitution im Quantor \(\exists!\)]{%
  \mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi \vdash
  (\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists! y\, [y / x] \phi)
}{sb8euv}{%
  \DeltaRow{Formeln}{\phi}%
  \DeltaRow{Variablen}{x\dsep y}%
}
\begin{tabproof}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, \phi}{\rA}
  \proofstep{1}{\mathrm{F}\!/\;y\, [w / x] \phi}{\FormulaRefAuto{nfsbv}{1}}
  \proofstep{1}{(\exists! x\, \phi \leftrightarrow \exists! y\, [y / x] \phi)}{\FormulaRefAuto{sb8eulem}{2}}
\end{tabproof}

\begin{remark}\FormulaRefAuto{df-eu} zerlegt eindeutige Existenz in Existenz und Eindeutigkeit, während \FormulaRefAuto{eu6} dieselbe Aussage in der klassischen Form ausdrückt, dass es ein Objekt gibt, auf das die Formel genau dann zutrifft, wenn es mit diesem Objekt identisch ist.\end{remark}
